profile.name: Vaishnav P M
profile.tagline: I build backend-heavy SaaS — APIs, auth systems, and real-time features that scale.
profile.bio: Full Stack Engineer with 3+ years shipping production SaaS and CRM platforms. I specialise in backend architecture — REST APIs, multi-tenant systems, authentication flows, and real-time features. I own features end-to-end, from database design to the React UI.

experience.summary: Building backend-heavy SaaS and CRM modules for enterprise clients, including a multi-tenant ticketing and asset management platform.
highlights: Architected a multi-tenant ticketing platform with organisation-scoped data access and RBAC — supporting concurrent enterprise clients without data leakage.
Implemented JWT, LDAP/Active Directory, and Google OAuth authentication flows with secure token handling, reducing auth-related support tickets.
Integrated Redis and Bull-based queue processing for async email, SMS, and in-app notification delivery, decoupling notification load from the main API.
Built real-time notification features using Socket.IO and WebSockets, enabling live status updates across the platform.
Optimised PostgreSQL queries and caching strategies, improving API response times and backend reliability for production workloads.
Collaborated directly with US-based clients across sprint demos, feature validation, and production issue resolution.

experience.summary: Delivered 6+ web and mobile applications across booking, CRM, and commerce domains using React, React Native, NestJS, and PostgreSQL.
highlights: Delivered 6+ production web and mobile apps end-to-end, covering frontend, backend APIs, and database workflows.
Designed backend services following clean architecture principles, reducing defect rework and improving maintainability across projects.
Integrated Firebase Authentication and OTP-based login systems for mobile-first applications.
Optimised PostgreSQL and Oracle queries, improving query execution performance and API response efficiency.

experience.summary: Provided L2 application and infrastructure support for enterprise environments serving 100+ daily users.
highlights: Supported 100+ daily users across application, network, and server incidents while maintaining high SLA compliance.
Resolved system and infrastructure issues in enterprise environments, building a strong foundation in production operations.

projects.title: Enterprise Ticketing & Asset Management
projects.subtitle: Multi-tenant SaaS platform for enterprise IT operations
projects.description: A multi-tenant SaaS platform handling ticketing, asset tracking, workflow automation, and RBAC-based access control for enterprise clients. Built with NestJS, PostgreSQL, Redis, and Socket.IO.

projects.title: Marketing Research SaaS Platform
projects.subtitle: Multi-tenant workspace for research teams
projects.description: A multi-tenant marketing research platform where organisations manage their own workspace, users, projects, and studies. Built SSR-enabled Next.js pages with meeting, calendar, polls, and takeaway interfaces.

projects.title: Travel CRM
projects.subtitle: Itinerary and customer workflow management
projects.description: Full-stack CRM for travel operations — itinerary management, dynamic scheduling, customer workflows, and package management with reusable UI components and API integrations.

projects.title: Kenya Airways — Staff Booking Portal
projects.subtitle: Internal booking and scheduling system
projects.description: Staff-facing portal for Kenya Airways with booking workflows, scheduling features, and optimised relational database interactions for operational reliability.

projects.title: Commerce Platforms — NextME / Rockana
projects.subtitle: E-commerce and customer management systems
projects.description: Frontend modules, backend APIs, and database integrations for commerce and customer management. Covered product listings, order workflows, and customer operations.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology — Electronics & Communication Engineering
